feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to configure roles to ensure segregation of duties for managing payments?
entry.content: I understand specific administration roles will be able to set up approval paths for payments with S/4 HANA Cloud Public. However, what controls are there to ensure the same role is unable to change bank account details of payees?

entry.title: Service Quotations (Requested Start Date - End Date)
entry.content:
Good afternoon 

Please your help!

In the app Manage Service Quotation (from SAP S4 HANA Public Edition) when I finished creating a Service Quotation I start to notice that the original date that I enter is different from the end date, as the system updates it to 2 days before the original date. Why this happen? And also why my posting date is a day after I saved my document?

entry.title: SAP S/4 Migration
entry.content: S/4 Migration Project – insight into running parallel S/4 projects and how that impacts SAP landscapes and processes to ensure alignment and retrofit in a possible (N+2) scenario would be helpful.

entry.title: Overall Open Orders
entry.content:
Hello 

Trying to understand logic behind overall open orders in SAP 4/HANA public cloud. 

Overall open orders = open orders and open billing requests. 

My query is on the open billing requests. The calculation is not taking or adjusting for lines that are not completely invoiced. It is keeping the total for these lines in the calculation which is incorrect as it is not all open (been partially shipped/invoiced). 

Is there something in the order or is there something else that needs to be adjusted to ensure the overall open orders report is correct. 

Adam

entry.title: How to Monitor Adobe Document Services (ADS) Request Usage in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

According to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition Service Use Description, each customer tenant is entitled to 2,000,000 ADS API requests per year for form generation via Adobe Document Services (ADS).
We are using standard PDF form outputs (e.g. billing documents, purchase orders), and I understand that each form generation counts as one request.

However, I couldn’t find a way to monitor or track the number of ADS requests made in our tenant.

Does SAP provide any tool, dashboard, API, or log that can help:

  • track the current number of ADS API calls used,

  • estimate remaining quota for the year,

  • or identify high-usage documents or processes?

Thanks in advance!

Adrian

entry.title: Automatic Stock Transfer Requisition Based on ATP Check Across Multiple Plants (Diff. Company Codes)
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently testing stock transfer orders between different plants in S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition: 1010, 1710, and 3310. Each of these plants belongs to a different company code (1010, 1710, and 3310 respectively). all the Org units are on the same Cloud Public Edition System.

Our desired scenario is as follows:

When a customer places an order in plant 1010 (Germany) for material TG00, a sales order is created. During this process, we would like the system to automatically check material availability (ATP) in plants 1710 and 3310. If stock is available in either of those plants, the system should automatically create a stock transfer purchase requisition from one or two of the supplying plant (1710 or 3310) to plant 1010.

We have the following questions:

  1. How should we configure the system to define plants 1710 and 3310 as possible supplying plants for material TG00? Should we use Purchasing Info Records, a Special Procurement Key, or another method?

  2. How can we set up the ATP check to consider stock availability in both plants 1710 and 3310 for the requested delivery date in the sales order?

We are currently testing the Best Practices BME, BMH, 1P7, 5HP

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: Generating Billing Document Request from Service Contract
entry.content:
I’m using SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition and currently working on generating a Billing Document Request (BDR) from a service contract. When the contract contains only one line item, the system creates a single BDR as expected. However, when I include multiple line items in the service contract—even if all of them share the same billing date—the system generates separate BDRs for each line item. My requirement is to generate a single BDR that includes all line items corresponding to that billing date. Could someone please guide me on how to achieve this?

Thanks.

entry.title: VAT on down-payments made in Public cloud
entry.content: The client requests the process to post down payment made to supplier with VAT amount. I don't see where to configure "VAT on down-payments made" G/L account. Could you advise this process in Public Cloud? Thank you.

entry.title: Unable to define Custom Naming Rules for Payment Medium Files
entry.content:
I want to define a Custom Naming Rules for the Payment Medium File format.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Revenue Recognition Key cannot be maintained for FOC item categories
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

there is no possibility to set a Revenue Recognition Key for the following FOC Item Categories:

  • TADN
  • CBXN 
  • CBXB 
  • CBLN 
  • CBXL
  • CB4
  • C4L 

However, we need the possibility to set a Revenue Recognition Key for FOC Item Categories as the first Sales Order Line Item derives the Revenue Recognition Key.

Can you please let us know if this is possible? 

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Reporting in GSTR1
entry.content:
Business has a scenario wherein GST is paid on advances received from customer. Such value of advances received and cleared subsequently against the billing documents has to be reported in the GSTR1 alongwith the annexure . Theses annexures comprises of the summary of these advances state wise and document wise. This data required is not available in the standard reports provided by the system and as this a statutory requirement request you to share the details of any SAP note or report available which would help for the reporting in GSTR1. Subsequently these details are also required for the GSTR3B as well. 

The sample GSTR1 is attached herewith wherein the fields required for reporting of advances value is highlighted on Page 4- Point 11A(1),11A(2),11B(1), 11B(2).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Requirement to trigger automated email on production order release
entry.content:
Description – We would like to implement a functionality in SAP public cloud where, upon releasing a production order, an automated email is triggered to notify specific recipients. Currently, no such notification is being sent. We would like to understand the standard for recommended approach to enable this functionality. Please provide guidance on the configuration or development steps required to trigger an automated email upon production order release.

 

Requirements –

  • Trigger email automatically when a prod. Order is released.
  • Email should be sent to predefined recipients.
  • Looking for a standard or recommended solution.

SAP PUBLIC CLOUD latest version 2502 

Regards,
Ankit Kumar

entry.title: "Print queue name can't be initial" warning when trying to display document
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When checking the output of a Sales Document and clicking on 'Display Document' button, a warning dis displayed: "Print queue name can't be initial".
The users then have to click on 'Continue' to skip this warning. Is there a way to not show this warning or proceed automatically?

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S4 Cloud Public in J77 test script, prequisite 6BP test script is missing
entry.content:
We are doing SAP Cloud Public in J77 test script - Advanced Bank Account Management:
4.3. Create In-House Account via eBAM step, there is a prequisite 6BP test script that I have to activate before testing the J77 test script.
However, I can't find the prequisite 6BP - Create via eBAM Integration step in In-House Banking test script.
I have checked on the Internet, on SAP for me portal, among master data scrips, but I didn't find it.
Do you know where can I find the Create via eBAM Integration step in In-House Banking 6BP script? Does it have a new name?
Thank you.

entry.title: How to solve Partner function is not defined in partner procedure error?
entry.content:
We are getting the error "Partner function XX* is not defined in partner procedure ABC*", how can we solve this?

*Where XX represents the Partner Function ID and ABC represents the partner procedure. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with billing Document type F2
entry.content:
Issue Details:

 

The business have requirement for triggering 4 different Invoice billing documents and in S4 PERSON_NAME Public Cloud, we have only 1 billing document type (F2 ).

 

With OPD configuration, system is able to recognize only one document type and the same is triggering every time based on the defined rules for determination.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Side by Side extension APPlication
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing a peculiar issue for our custom side by side application which we have created BTP with S4HANA public cloud. 

Our architecture includes "S4HANA extensibility service" for creating communication arrangements on the Public cloud side along with the development of custom app using NODE.js within CF framework. 

Our destination service connectivity is all intact and we have been able to pull the metadata of the service using the user id and password we provided in the json file we used for the "S4HANA extensibility service"

We have one subaccount and have tied it up with the IAS/IPS server of the S4HANA public cloud. Our global account is still tied up with the standard (default) SAP ID.

 

When we try to get to our portal/workzone subscription site, we get authenticated via IAS server of public cloud which is correct. However, when the site tries to open, we get the below error 

Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to third party cloud system without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are working on requirement to integrate SAP and non-SAP system. We have SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition through which we need to do API call (GET/POST), provided by third party cloud system. I understand we can achieve same with SAP 'Integration suite service' (hosted on SAP BTP account) but in our case it is not an option to do so.

We are looking to do Direct API call ( like how can we do on ECC or S/4 on premise system, by using SM59 HTTP connection and using cl_http* class) .

But can we achieve same with SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition without any integration (middleware) system?

It would be very helpful if someone has any insights regarding this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Activate activity-based consolidation of Investments
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would like to use the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments. As this is not activated by default in the cloud solution anymore, we request to activate the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments in our cloud system, as we do not wish to use rule-based consolidation. Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to automate the Audit Extraction Data related to ITGC in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts, 

I am looking for a solution, where we can automate the process of extracting the data related ITGC audit controls and if there is any possibility of the same ?

We have few ITGC Controls in place which utilizes the application in S4HANA Public cloud such as i.e. "Manage Business Users", "Manager Business Roles", "Import Collection", "Display Technical Roles" etc which would help us to do a check to make sure that the audit regulations are met.

Any such lead on this would be much appreciated. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Evans Aarons
